name: local-rag-mgmt
description: Explicitly invoked Local RAG management skills for indexing folders, removing one folder index, and resetting owned local index data.

interface.longDescription: Three manually invoked management skills index a folder, remove an exact folder index with confirmation, or reset owned Local RAG data with confirmation.
defaultPrompt: Use $rag-index to index a local folder.
Use $rag-remove-index to remove one folder index.
Use $rag-reset to reset owned Local RAG index data.
